scripts.test: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm --filter @worker-state/shared build && pnpm --filter @worker-state/shared test && pnpm --filter @worker-state/api test
scripts.dev:api: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm --filter @worker-state/shared build && pnpm --filter @worker-state/api dev
scripts.dev:worker: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm --filter @worker-state/shared build && pnpm --filter @worker-state/worker dev
scripts.dev:dispatcher: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm --filter @worker-state/shared build && pnpm --filter @worker-state/dispatcher dev
